title: Mining Ball
description: The Mining Ball data pack lets you instantly clear 10 \times 10 areas by throwing snowballs in Minecraft Java 1.16.2 to 1.21+. It replaces tedious digging with a simple, mod-free utility for rapid terraforming and excavation.
body:
# 💥 The Mining Ball: Instant Excavation at Your Fingertips!

Tired of spending hours clearing out land for your mega-base? Say goodbye to broken pickaxes, tedious grinding, and endless block-breaking. Meet your new best friend: **The Mining Ball**.

With this lightweight utility data pack, terraforming and massive excavations are just a throw away!

## 🌟 How It Works
It’s beautifully simple: **Just throw a snowball, and instantly mine a massive 10x10 area.** Whether you are hollowing out a mountain, building a massive underground bunker, or just trying to clear out a perimeter, the Mining Ball does the heavy lifting for you in a fraction of a second. 

## 🛠️ Why You'll Love It
* **Massive Time Saver:** Clear out massive chunks of land instantly. What used to take hours now takes seconds.
* **Builder's Best Friend:** Perfect for flattening terrain or creating massive underground perimeters for your farms and mega-bases.
* **Highly Compatible:** Fully functional across a wide range of versions (1.16.2 all the way up to 1.21+).
* **Easy Install:** It's purely a data pack! Drop it into your world folder and you are ready to go—no complex mod loaders required.

![Jj](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc7f7d71aa756b2d1de712dc84560ce0f9ef5f7d.png)


## ⚠️ Important Performance Note
*With great power comes... a tiny bit of lag!* Because Minecraft is being asked to break hundreds of blocks in a single tick, you will likely experience a short, temporary lag spike right when the snowball lands. **This is completely normal** and is just the game engine processing the massive block updates. Use it wisely, and try not to throw 10 of them at the exact same time! 😉

---

### 💡 Fun Ways to Use the Mining Ball:
1.  **The Instant Strip Mine:** Throw it down toward bedrock to quickly expose hidden caves and resources.
2.  **The Mountain Carver:** Easily hollow out the side of a cliff to build your hidden base.
3.  **Emergency Escape:** Need a quick exit from a horde of zombies? Blast a hole through the wall and run!

---
